_comment: Plugin MCP wiring. Google-family connectors (Drive, Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, Search Console, Tag Manager) are NOT pre-wired here — they are enabled by each marketer through Claude desktop's native Connectors UI (Customize → Connectors). The /setup-marketing skill walks them through it. Listed below are only vendor-native MCPs the plugin pre-wires.

ahrefs._comment: Already in use at OnlineMinds. SEO keyword research, backlinks, site audits, Brand Radar (AI mentions/GEO). Vendor-native MCP — not on Anthropic's catalog. Authorize via Ahrefs API key on first use.

similarweb._comment: Competitive traffic analysis and market benchmarking. Vendor-native MCP.

notion._comment: Optional. Briefs, playbooks, campaign docs if any live in Notion. Vendor-native MCP.

supabase._comment: Already in use. Pull product/usage data for portfolio sites where relevant. Vendor-native MCP.

vercel._comment: Already in use. Inspect deployments / the plecto-sync style cron jobs that feed data into the hub. Vendor-native MCP.

slack._comment: Optional. Share finished reports and briefs with the team. Vendor-native MCP. Remove if OnlineMinds does not use Slack.
